description_long: This is a modern grave monument consisting of a polished black stone headstone with a rounded top, set on a rectangular base. The headstone features an engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions including a name, dates, and an epitaph, all rendered in white. In front of the headstone, there is a small, decorative black vase or urn placed on the left side of the base. The grave plot is bordered by a low, rectangular frame, with a green surface inside, possibly representing artificial turf or grass. The overall design is sleek and somber, with a focus on clean lines and a high-contrast color scheme. The materials and finish suggest durability and resistance to weathering.
description: A polished black stone grave monument with a rounded headstone, engraved portrait and inscriptions, a decorative urn, and a green-bordered grave plot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the headstone, the urn on the left, and the rectangular grave plot with green interior.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and the urn positioned to the left of the headstone.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the urn on the right and the full length of the grave plot with its green surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and the rectangular base.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: Все будет хорошо в воле твоей. Прощай, родная
